content:
Echoing an email from @Giacomo here:

Dear all,
We are happy to announce that ItaCa Fest is back with its 7th edition. We will begin on the 21st of April at 3:00 PM Italian time.

As usual, you can find all the relevant information (schedule, abstracts, and zoom link) at the following page:
https://progetto-itaca.github.io/fests/fest26.html

This year's speakers will include: Lucatelli Nunes, Cioffo, Caviglia, Gurski, Clarke, Spadetto, Reggio, Boccali, Hora, Galal, Lanfranchi, Vasilakopoulou, Loubaton, Zapata Castro, Haine, Gadducci, Román, Gonda.

See you online on the 21st of April!
Best regards,
Giacomo
On behalf of the Scientific Committee.
